StyledText.Data: This is the name of the theme as it appears in the FAT when creating a new Title. It doesn’t need to be unique.
This is the client logo that will brand the training. The logo in this field is only used for scrolling productions and should be Width = X px and Height = Y px. SVG is recommended, otherwise PNG.
The colors of the striped horizontal divider line. Viable colors: black,white,primary,secondary,fail,success etc... and hex color. Should be written comma-separated i.e. “black,primary”
This is the client logo that will brand the training. The logo in this field is only used for slide productions and should be Width = X px and Height = Y px. SVG is recommended, otherwise PNG.
Insert a font CSS file that will be exported to the content/theme/ folder. Only for Site packages (Jan 2022).
Styles override will be added to the "styles" object in them.json exorted to content/theme/ folder. Only for Site packages (Jan 2022).
A theme does normally belong to a specific client. However, when creating a Title any theme can be selected.
This is the theme identifier that will be exported in the Package JSON. A theme with this name must be included in the template styles otherwise it will default to theme = Base project One.

LayoutObject.name: Predifened color name

StyledText.Data: Predefined color name HexColor. Client color name
Theme colors. Pre-defined color name is referred via code and cannot be changed.Client color name can be any name.
<<FAT Theme TextStyle @ Template::Predefined Text style Name>> Style type: <<FAT Theme TextStyle @ Template::Type>>

CharacterStyle.Text: <<FAT Theme TextStyle @ Template::Predefined Text style Name>>

LayoutObject.name: TextStyle name Copy5
TextStyle name Copy3
TextStyle name Copy4
TextStyle name Copy2
TextStyle FontFamily
TextStyle name Copy6

StyledText.Data: Theme textstyles. Can be chosen in page item, page, chapter and package settings from Funkis Player version 1.13 and forward.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Theme TextStyle::gTextStyleType ) Or IsEmpty ( FAT Theme TextStyle::gTextStylePredefined )

StyledText.Data: Font size Font weight. Line height Letter space Color Alignment

LayoutObject.name: Predifened color name Copy

StyledText.Data: Add font files that will be exported to the content/theme/ folder. Mark styles included in each font file. Only for Site packages (Jan 2022).

The button radius decides the visual appearance of the navigation buttons in both slide and scroll. (Next, Previous, Menu etc) None = squared button corners. The color of the buttons are set by the colors button_background and button_foreground.
